description: DaVinci flow for the Super Banking transaction authorization demo. Collects transaction amount and type, authenticates the user via PingOne SSO, calls PingOne Authorize with Super Banking policy parameters (Amount, TransactionType, UserId, Acr, Timestamp), then displays the PERMIT/DENY/STEP-UP decision.
name: Super Banking Authorize Dashboard

settings.csp: worker-src 'self' blob:; script-src 'self' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net https://code.jquery.com https://devsdk.singularkey.com http://cdnjs.cloudflare.com 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval';

customHTML.value:
{{#if navBar}}

{{navBar}}

{{/if}}

Super Banking

Transaction Authorization Demo

PingOne Authorize Policy Demo
Enter a transaction amount and type, then sign in. PingOne Authorize will evaluate the policy and return a real-time PERMIT, DENY, or Step-Up decision.

Active Policy Rules

Amount > $50,000 DENY
Transfer / Withdrawal > $10,000 without MFA STEP-UP
All other transactions PERMIT
